query: How do I reset my password?
expected_answer: To reset your password, go to the login page and click on 'Forgot Password'. Follow the instructions sent to your email.
context: Users can reset their passwords via the 'Forgot Password' link on the login screen. An email with a reset link will be sent to the registered address.

expected_answer: You can request a full refund within 30 days of purchase if you are not satisfied with the service.
context: Our refund policy allows for a 100% money-back guarantee within the first 30 days of any subscription plan.

expected_answer: Currently, Evaliphy is a TypeScript/Node.js SDK. Python support is on the roadmap for Q4.
context: Evaliphy is built for the Node.js ecosystem. We are planning to release a Python version in the fourth quarter of this year.

expected_answer: You can contact support by emailing support@evaliphy.ai or through the live chat on our website.
context: Support is available 24/7 via email at support@evaliphy.ai. You can also use the chat widget in the bottom right corner of the dashboard.
